<!--
  Pull Request template for macOSTahoe-Setup.
  The /pr skill reads this file and fills each section from the branch diff vs main.
  Keep headings and checkbox syntax stable so the skill can populate them reliably.
-->

## Summary
<!-- 1-3 sentences: what does this PR do? -->

## Motivation / Context
<!-- Why is this change needed? What problem does it solve? -->

## Changes
<!-- One bullet per logical change; reference file paths parenthetically -->
-

## Type of change
<!-- Check one. The /pr skill will pre-select the dominant type. -->
- [ ] feat — new feature
- [ ] fix — bug fix
- [ ] docs — documentation only
- [ ] refactor — no behavior change
- [ ] chore — maintenance/tooling
- [ ] test — tests only
- [ ] perf — performance
- [ ] build / ci — build or CI config
- [ ] breaking — breaking change (migration required)

## Checklist
- [ ] Tests added/updated
- [ ] Docs (README / docs/) updated
- [ ] `make soft-test` passes locally
- [ ] Migration notes added (if breaking)
